inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical height of the retaining wall from base to top.

inputs.label: Soil Unit Weight
inputs.businessContext: Unit weight of the backfill soil.

inputs.label: Friction Angle
inputs.businessContext: Internal friction angle of the soil.

inputs.label: Cohesion
inputs.businessContext: Cohesion of the soil. Enter 0 for granular soils.

inputs.label: Surcharge Load
inputs.businessContext: Uniform surcharge load applied on the backfill surface.

formulas.basePressureActive: ((1 - Math.sin(frictionAngle * Math.PI / 180)) / (1 + Math.sin(frictionAngle * Math.PI / 180))) * (soilUnitWeight * height + surcharge)
formulas.totalActiveForce: ((1 - Math.sin(frictionAngle * Math.PI / 180)) / (1 + Math.sin(frictionAngle * Math.PI / 180))) * (0.5 * soilUnitWeight * height ** 2 + surcharge * height)
formulas.momentBaseActive: ((1 - Math.sin(frictionAngle * Math.PI / 180)) / (1 + Math.sin(frictionAngle * Math.PI / 180))) * (soilUnitWeight * height ** 3 / 3 + surcharge * height ** 2 / 2)
